title: Scratch Basics
description: What Scratch is, block categories and colours, and how to animate a sprite using sequence — with three hands-on builds.

steps.title: Do Now Activity
steps.content:
Do Now

Scratch is a block-based programming language. You drag and snap coloured blocks together instead of typing code.
steps.js: createMCQ('sb-dna',['Drag and snap coloured blocks together','Type lines of code','Draw pictures','Use a spreadsheet'],0,'Correct — Scratch uses drag-and-drop blocks.','In Scratch you build programs by dragging and snapping coloured blocks together.');

steps.title: Block Categories
steps.content:
Block colours and categories

Every block has a colour that tells you which category it belongs to. You will use these constantly.

ColourCategoryWhat it does
BlueMotionMove and turn sprites
PurpleLooksSay things, change costume, resize
YellowEventsStart scripts — e.g. when green flag clicked
OrangeControlLoops and if/else
Light blueSensingDetect keys, touching, mouse
Dark orangeVariablesStore and change values

A script always starts with an Events block (yellow). Then you snap other blocks beneath it.

when green flag clicked
say [Hello!] for (2) seconds
move (10) steps

steps.title: Build 1: Say and Move
steps.content:
Build 1: say and move

Build the script below. Blocks run top to bottom — that is sequence.

when green flag clicked
say [Hello!] for (2) seconds
move (10) steps
turn right (90) degrees
say [Done!] for (1) seconds
  1. Find when green flag clicked in Events (yellow)
  2. Snap say [Hello!] for (2) seconds underneath — Looks (purple)
  3. Snap move (10) steps — Motion (blue)
  4. Snap turn right (90) degrees — Motion
  5. Snap say [Done!] for (1) seconds — Looks
  6. Click the green flag to run it
steps.js: (function(){var NW=1100,NH=650;function sf(){var f=document.getElementById('y7-scratch-frame');if(!f)return;var w=f.parentElement,bar=w.querySelector('.y7-check-bar'),bH=bar?bar.offsetHeight:44,fs=w.classList.contains('y7-fullscreen'),aW=fs?window.innerWidth:w.clientWidth,sc=fs?Math.min(aW/NW,(window.innerHeight-bH)/NH):aW/NW;f.style.width=NW+'px';f.style.height=NH+'px';f.style.transform='scale('+sc+')';f.style.marginBottom=Math.round(NH*(sc-1))+'px';f.style.marginLeft=fs?Math.max(0,Math.round((aW-NW*sc)/2))+'px':'0';}function tfs(){var f=document.getElementById('y7-scratch-frame'),w=f.parentElement,b=document.getElementById('y7-fs-btn'),fs=w.classList.toggle('y7-fullscreen');b.textContent=fs?'✕':'⛶';if(fs){window._sy=window.scrollY;document.body.style.overflow='hidden';}else{document.body.style.overflow='';window.scrollTo(0,window._sy||0);}sf();}sf();if(window._sfR)window.removeEventListener('resize',window._sfR);window._sfR=sf;window.addEventListener('resize',sf);if(window._sfK)document.removeEventListener('keydown',window._sfK);window._sfK=function(e){if(e.key==='Escape'){var f=document.getElementById('y7-scratch-frame');if(f&&f.parentElement.classList.contains('y7-fullscreen'))tfs();}};document.addEventListener('keydown',window._sfK);document.getElementById('y7-fs-btn').onclick=tfs;document.getElementById('y7-check-btn').onclick=function(){runStepRuntimeTest({kind:'greenFlagMoves',waitMs:2600},'✓ Sprite moved after the say block!','Sprite did not move — check the green flag, say, and move blocks are all connected.');};})()

steps.title: Build 2: Animate with Costumes
steps.content:
Build 2: animate with costumes

Sprites have multiple costumes (different looks). Switching between them inside a loop makes the sprite animate.

when green flag clicked
forever
  next costume
  wait (0.1) seconds
end
  1. Click the Costumes tab — the cat has two costumes already
  2. Go back to Code tab
  3. Add when green flag clicked (Events)
  4. Add a forever loop (Control — orange)
  5. Inside the loop: next costume (Looks)
  6. Inside the loop: wait (0.1) seconds (Control)
  7. Click the flag — the cat should walk!
steps.js: (function(){var NW=1100,NH=650;function sf(){var f=document.getElementById('y7-scratch-frame');if(!f)return;var w=f.parentElement,bar=w.querySelector('.y7-check-bar'),bH=bar?bar.offsetHeight:44,fs=w.classList.contains('y7-fullscreen'),aW=fs?window.innerWidth:w.clientWidth,sc=fs?Math.min(aW/NW,(window.innerHeight-bH)/NH):aW/NW;f.style.width=NW+'px';f.style.height=NH+'px';f.style.transform='scale('+sc+')';f.style.marginBottom=Math.round(NH*(sc-1))+'px';f.style.marginLeft=fs?Math.max(0,Math.round((aW-NW*sc)/2))+'px':'0';}function tfs(){var f=document.getElementById('y7-scratch-frame'),w=f.parentElement,b=document.getElementById('y7-fs-btn'),fs=w.classList.toggle('y7-fullscreen');b.textContent=fs?'✕':'⛶';if(fs){window._sy=window.scrollY;document.body.style.overflow='hidden';}else{document.body.style.overflow='';window.scrollTo(0,window._sy||0);}sf();}sf();if(window._sfR)window.removeEventListener('resize',window._sfR);window._sfR=sf;window.addEventListener('resize',sf);if(window._sfK)document.removeEventListener('keydown',window._sfK);window._sfK=function(e){if(e.key==='Escape'){var f=document.getElementById('y7-scratch-frame');if(f&&f.parentElement.classList.contains('y7-fullscreen'))tfs();}};document.addEventListener('keydown',window._sfK);document.getElementById('y7-fs-btn').onclick=tfs;document.getElementById('y7-check-btn').onclick=function(){runStepRuntimeTest({kind:'greenFlagChangesCostume'},'✓ Costume is animating!','Costume not changing — make sure next costume is inside a forever loop.');};})()

steps.title: Build 3: Move and Animate Together
steps.content:
Build 3: move and animate together

Now combine movement and costume animation so the sprite walks across the stage and bounces off edges.

when green flag clicked
forever
  move (5) steps
  next costume
  wait (0.1) seconds
  if on edge, bounce
end
  1. Start fresh — right-click the script area and delete all blocks
  2. Build the script shown above
  3. if on edge, bounce is in Motion (blue)
  4. Click the flag — your sprite should walk back and forth!
  5. Try changing the number in move ( ) steps — what happens?
steps.js: (function(){var NW=1100,NH=650;function sf(){var f=document.getElementById('y7-scratch-frame');if(!f)return;var w=f.parentElement,bar=w.querySelector('.y7-check-bar'),bH=bar?bar.offsetHeight:44,fs=w.classList.contains('y7-fullscreen'),aW=fs?window.innerWidth:w.clientWidth,sc=fs?Math.min(aW/NW,(window.innerHeight-bH)/NH):aW/NW;f.style.width=NW+'px';f.style.height=NH+'px';f.style.transform='scale('+sc+')';f.style.marginBottom=Math.round(NH*(sc-1))+'px';f.style.marginLeft=fs?Math.max(0,Math.round((aW-NW*sc)/2))+'px':'0';}function tfs(){var f=document.getElementById('y7-scratch-frame'),w=f.parentElement,b=document.getElementById('y7-fs-btn'),fs=w.classList.toggle('y7-fullscreen');b.textContent=fs?'✕':'⛶';if(fs){window._sy=window.scrollY;document.body.style.overflow='hidden';}else{document.body.style.overflow='';window.scrollTo(0,window._sy||0);}sf();}sf();if(window._sfR)window.removeEventListener('resize',window._sfR);window._sfR=sf;window.addEventListener('resize',sf);if(window._sfK)document.removeEventListener('keydown',window._sfK);window._sfK=function(e){if(e.key==='Escape'){var f=document.getElementById('y7-scratch-frame');if(f&&f.parentElement.classList.contains('y7-fullscreen'))tfs();}};document.addEventListener('keydown',window._sfK);document.getElementById('y7-fs-btn').onclick=tfs;document.getElementById('y7-check-btn').onclick=function(){runStepRuntimeTest({kind:'greenFlagMoves'},'✓ Sprite moves and bounces!','Sprite did not move — check the forever loop has move steps and if on edge, bounce.');};})()

steps.title: Build 4: Add Effects
steps.content:
Build 4: add visual effects

Looks blocks let you add colour effects and resize sprites. Experiment and add at least two visual effects to your walking sprite.

when green flag clicked
forever
  move (5) steps
  next costume
  change [color v] effect by (25)
  wait (0.1) seconds
  if on edge, bounce
end
  1. Keep your walking script from Build 3
  2. Add change [color] effect by (25) inside the forever loop (Looks)
  3. Also try set size to (50)% right after the green flag block
  4. Experiment — change numbers and see what happens

Click Check when you have added at least one effect block:
steps.js: (function(){var NW=1100,NH=650;function sf(){var f=document.getElementById('y7-scratch-frame');if(!f)return;var w=f.parentElement,bar=w.querySelector('.y7-check-bar'),bH=bar?bar.offsetHeight:44,fs=w.classList.contains('y7-fullscreen'),aW=fs?window.innerWidth:w.clientWidth,sc=fs?Math.min(aW/NW,(window.innerHeight-bH)/NH):aW/NW;f.style.width=NW+'px';f.style.height=NH+'px';f.style.transform='scale('+sc+')';f.style.marginBottom=Math.round(NH*(sc-1))+'px';f.style.marginLeft=fs?Math.max(0,Math.round((aW-NW*sc)/2))+'px':'0';}function tfs(){var f=document.getElementById('y7-scratch-frame'),w=f.parentElement,b=document.getElementById('y7-fs-btn'),fs=w.classList.toggle('y7-fullscreen');b.textContent=fs?'✕':'⛶';if(fs){window._sy=window.scrollY;document.body.style.overflow='hidden';}else{document.body.style.overflow='';window.scrollTo(0,window._sy||0);}sf();}sf();if(window._sfR)window.removeEventListener('resize',window._sfR);window._sfR=sf;window.addEventListener('resize',sf);if(window._sfK)document.removeEventListener('keydown',window._sfK);window._sfK=function(e){if(e.key==='Escape'){var f=document.getElementById('y7-scratch-frame');if(f&&f.parentElement.classList.contains('y7-fullscreen'))tfs();}};document.addEventListener('keydown',window._sfK);document.getElementById('y7-fs-btn').onclick=tfs;document.getElementById('y7-check-btn').onclick=function(){runStepRuntimeTest({kind:'greenFlagMoves'},'✓ Walking animation with effects running!','Sprite did not move — keep your Build 3 script and add effects to it.');}catch(e){r.style.color='#fca5a5';r.textContent='Could not check: '+e.message;}};})()

quizQuestions.q: What does the 'when green flag clicked' block do?

options: Instructions running top to bottom in order

quizQuestions.q: Which script makes a sprite walk and animate?
options: when flag clicked → forever → move (5) steps → next costume

quizQuestions.q: Build a script that starts when the green flag is clicked and makes the sprite say hello, then move. Click Check & Submit.
quizQuestions.sampleAnswer: when flag clicked → say [Hello!] for 2 seconds → move 10 steps

quizQuestions.q: Build a script that animates the sprite using a forever loop and next costume. Click Check & Submit.
quizQuestions.sampleAnswer: when flag clicked → forever → next costume → wait 0.1 seconds

quizQuestions.q: Build a sprite that moves and bounces off the edge in a forever loop. Click Check & Submit.
quizQuestions.sampleAnswer: when flag clicked → forever → move 5 steps → if on edge, bounce
